characters.name: Baby Angry
characters.description:
Baby AngryCharacter InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesNommieEye colorBlueAge3Baby Angry is one of the newer characters in Om Nom Stories. She first appears in the intro for the episode "No Tears". Her first in-episode appearance is inSporty Nom. Baby Angry is a pink-skinned nommie. Her design is very similar toNibble Nom. She also has blue eyes and a blue bow.
And also under her bow we will soon reveal what's there, so wait!

characters.name: Barrett Leddy
characters.description: Barrett LeddyGenderMaleBornMay 6, 1992Age33JobActorSingerWriterVoicedOm NomHomepageBarrett LeddyIMDbBarrett LeddyBarrett Leddyis an actor, writer, voice actor, and singer. Claimed to have played the voice ofOm NominThe Magic Microphone, he also plays the voice of Akira Zaizen in the English dub of Yugioh and Black Sapphire Cookie in CookieRun: Kingdom! Vrains, and has appeared in other series such as Pokemon, Panda and Krash, and 44 Cats. As an Audie Award-winning audiobook narrator, Barrett has narrated titles for Audible, PenguinAudio and HarperAudio. His vocal talents have been featured on The Howard Stern Show. Singer Writer

characters.name: Boo
characters.description: BooCharacter InformationGenderMaleSpeciesNommieEye colorBlackAppearancesFirstUndergroundBoo is one of the minor characters inOm Nom Stories. He is one of the seven mommies thatOm Nommeets throughout the series, specifically in the third season. He is also one of the main characters of the gameCut the Rope 2. Boo is one of the Nommies that helpOm Nom. He is the fifthNommiethat Om Nom meets in the game. He is first seen in theUndergroundlocation. He is a purple nommie who exhibits fangs which match with his scary personality. Boo is described as a cheerful prankster that is not angry, but rather mischievous.

characters.name: Evan Coulton
characters.description: Evan CoultonEvan's face revealedCharacter InformationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanColorFair skinEye colorBlueAge12-13Date of birth1999Voiced byHimselfRelativesOm Nom (pet)Haley (classmate)Mr. Coulton (father)Mrs. Coulton (mother)AppearancesFirstStrange DeliveryFinalChristmas Special  Evan Coultonis the former deuteragonist of thefirst seasonofOm Nom Stories. He is a 13-year-old boy who foundOm Nomby his doorstep. Evan is a clumsy boy, and likes to eat sweets just like Om Nom. He also has a helicopter toy, knows how to safely use assorted medicines, and give Om Nom his baths.

characters.name: Ginger
characters.description: GingerCharacter InformationGenderMaleSpeciesNommieEye colorBlackAge5-10 Ginger is one of the minor characters inOm Nom Stories. She is also aNommiewho debuted in theBakerylocation ofCut the Rope 2. He seems to like Om Nom when he sees him, while Om Nom was afraid of him. Ginger is a living flame that kind of looks like a saw blade that's yellow and orange. His meeting withOm Nomis also shown inOm Nom Storiesin the Bakery episode. He is shown to be very mischievous at first. But then, afterOm Nomsaves his life from the water, he now wants to follow theNommiesand helpOm Nomfollow the candy and go back home.

characters.name: Lick
characters.description: LickCharacter InformationGenderMaleSpeciesNommieEye colorBlackLick is one of the minor characters inOm Nom Storiesand one of the main characters of the gameCut the Rope 2. Lick is one of theNommiesthat helpOm Nom. He is the second Nommie that Om Nom meets in the game. He is first seen in theSandy Dam. He is the secondNommiethat Om Nom meets in the game. He is first seen in theSandy Dam. Lick is an orange nommie with a puckered-like mouth and a long tongue. Like most nommies, his position is normally on 4 legs. In the episode Sandy Dam, Lick gets his tongue stuck under a rock in the ocean and tries to get it free. When Om Nom helps him set it free, he saves Om Nom by sticking his tongue to a tree branch and getting out of the water with Om Nom. So this may make Lick a nice fellow.
